ValidationRule.description: This rule is to help users to choose subject only from picklist, w/o typing any random word
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Subject <> "Meeting ", Subject <> "Call", Subject <> "Place Order", Subject <> "Additional Volumes", Subject <> "Financial Confirmation", Subject <> "Send Letter", Subject <> "Send Quote", Subject <> "Upcoming Birthday", Subject <> "Birthday Reminder", Subject <> "Email", Subject <> "Other", NOT(BEGINS(Subject, "E-Mail")))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please choose from Picklist. Выберите тему задачи из выпадающего списка
